title: Is there any proof that AT fields are 360 barriers
display_title: Is there any proof that AT fields are 360 barriers
wikitext:
[]: Is there any proof that AT fields are 360 barriers?             Quote Post by NeonZ » Wed Oct 27, 2004 1:48 pm It is a rather silly question, and I'm almost sure that they are a 360 barrier, but, could anyone give me any proof?

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Wed Oct 27, 2004 3:20 pm That is a hard thing to conclude, because in the series everyone remembers when something interacted with the AT Field, a flat, hexogon pattern materilized. So, it appears the AT Field is just concetrated on one side of the wielder. But, I think it completely encircles the user, because; 1. Then tactics like attacking the side unprotected by the AT Field would have been used. 2. When an explosion completely encirlced the user, like a N^2 mine, like on Sachiel, the first angel, if there had been no AT Field at his back, Sachiel should have died. 3. I think, I remember numeous times when an Evangelion attacked an angel from the side or back and the AT Field materilized, showing that the AT Field was present all around the user.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Oct 27, 2004 5:45 pm cain luppus wrote: 2. When an explosion completely encirlced the user, like a N^2 mine, like on Sachiel, the first angel, if there had been no AT Field at his back, Sachiel should have died.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Wed Oct 27, 2004 6:43 pm the at field had failed so that sachiel recieved some damage, but not the full force of the blast.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Oct 27, 2004 6:52 pm hmmm so how do they rank the strengh of the AT feild?? How do you make it stronger?

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Wed Oct 27, 2004 7:14 pm i don't know how they rank at field strength. ask EM or something

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Wed Oct 27, 2004 8:13 pm Dark FireStar wrote: hmmm so how do they rank the strengh of the AT feild?? How do you make it stronger?

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Wed Oct 27, 2004 8:24 pm don't forget another at field of the same wavelength

[]:             Quote Post by feliwood » Wed Oct 27, 2004 8:25 pm or a particle beam. or an N2 mine

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Wed Oct 27, 2004 8:41 pm Yeah, those too, but mostly iimpervious

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Oct 27, 2004 10:59 pm it filtered out most of the damage from the n2 mine...like with sachiel... we can assume that it can be directed in one direction with the most blocking force...

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Thu Oct 28, 2004 4:44 pm Things that can pierce or nulify an AT feild. 1- Lance of longnus 2-N2 Mine 3-particle beam 4-berserker 5-same wave lenght AT 6- A fart from Jesus ~There has to be a way to make you AT feild stronger. Could it be the amount of faith you have in it?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 28, 2004 5:10 pm Rei managed to break through Zeruel's Field simply by neutralizing his with Zero's.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Thu Oct 28, 2004 6:11 pm already been said reichu. Dark FireStar, i think to make it more powerful you have to be stronger or something. but your idea also makes sense

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Thu Oct 28, 2004 6:16 pm ChronoX wrote: Dark FireStar, i think to make it more powerful you have to be stronger or something. but your idea also makes sense

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Thu Oct 28, 2004 6:31 pm it isn't spiritual, its soul power only and i guess the stronger will one has, the stronger AT field it has. i have absoulutly no idea here, just stating things as they come

[]:             Quote Post by aranami » Fri Oct 29, 2004 12:07 am In ep. 24 Rei was able to produce an A.T. Field that was much larger then the one she had in the Eva

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 29, 2004 12:34 am ChronoX wrote: already been said reichu.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Fri Oct 29, 2004 8:28 am i think it has to do with hte angel. for example, arael (spider thingie) had a really weak AT field. however, kaworu had a much stronger at-field than all the others, and salpuitael (the big thing that dropped himself...forgive my forgetting the name) had his pierced by 00's prog knife. also, in that battle, the AT field acted like a solid, as Rei could pull it ans stretch it this was also shown in the battle with zereul (the blood splatters) perhaps it has to do with the angel's openness of heart?

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Oct 29, 2004 8:37 am now you mention it sss,isn't somewhere stated in the series that the angels will advance eventually?so theit AT field too..(and so their final stage will be the strongest living,the human=Kaworu)
